notes:
**Live co-editing on shared tasks — plus markdown summary sections.**

Task descriptions can now be edited together in real time when a project share grants **Live co-editing**: two cursors in one document on the owner side, and the same on federated ghost tasks for subscribers. Share mint and management pick up a co-editing toggle and badge. The Summary page gains user-authored markdown sections (with optional headers) and description subtitles on custom sections.

Also fixes writes failing with "Load failed" after the app has been idle, and shared-task edits no longer flash back to the old value before catching up.

Desktop + managed server image **0.24.0**. Existing installs: **Keen → Check for Updates** or Settings → Updates. Keen Cloud users: the app can roll your server automatically when you update.

## Install

| Platform | Artifact |
|---|---|
| Apple Silicon | `Keen_0.24.0_aarch64.dmg` |
| Intel Mac | `Keen_0.24.0_x64.dmg` |
